scripts.test:api: pnpm newman run docs/Local-Service-Marketplace.postman_collection.json --environment newman/newman.env.json --reporters cli,html,json --reporter-html-export test-reports/report.html --reporter-json-export test-reports/report.json
scripts.test:api:verbose: pnpm newman run docs/Local-Service-Marketplace.postman_collection.json --environment newman/newman.env.json --reporters cli,html,json --reporter-html-export test-reports/report.html --reporter-json-export test-reports/report.json --verbose
